title: cyclosorus zeylanicus
intro: Cyclosorus zeylanicus, also known as the Sri Lankan strap fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus zeylanicus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve overall cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tonics that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
